title: 11 Herbal Tinctures For Bone Health
description: Astragalus membranaceus tinctures contains isoflavones, triterpene saponins, and polysaccharides. These bioactive constituents have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. They also stimulate the production of osteoblasts, which are cells responsible for building bone tissue. Additionally, Astragalus membranaceus tinctures contain a compound called astragaloside IV, which has been shown to promote bone growth and density. By reducing inflammation and promoting bone cell activity,...
